text:
At 16:06 23/11/2001, David W. Chapman Jr. sent this up the stick:
>Just a rough guess, but shouldn't the cpu be
>
>mcpu=ev6 instead of
>
>mcpu=ev56

Nope, it's an 21164, which is EV56, running on a Miata (PWS 500au)

Cheers,
Rob
